patterns.battle_screen: Grid layout with side-view character sprites on the right, enemies on the left. Absolute positioned CTB timeline on top-left. Bottom section split into Command Menu (left) and Party Status (right).
patterns.hub_screen: Full-width/height canvas with absolute positioned UI overlays (chat bottom-left, minimap top-right, character status top-left).
patterns.panels: Thick solid white borders (2px to 4px) mimicking classic FF windows. Sharp corners (rounded-none).

components.button: bg-transparent border-2 border-transparent hover:border-white text-white p-2 text-left w-full relative group cursor-pointer

login_background.description: Vibrant abstract pixelated pattern for the login/title screen

battle_background.description: Dark abstract pixelated pattern for the battle background

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='attack-button', data-testid='login-submit')

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Press Start 2P' from Google Fonts for all major headings and UI labels. Import it in index.html or index.css.
Use 'VT323' from Google Fonts for body text and descriptive text.
Implement the MapleStory-style hub as an HTML5 Canvas or with DOM elements if simple enough, but Canvas is preferred for physics.
For the UI panels (like battle menus, skill trees), use the 'panel' component styles: dark semi-transparent backgrounds with thick solid white borders and sharp corners.
Ensure the combat timeline (CTB) is clearly visible in the top-left corner, displaying character/enemy turn order with small icons.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards for the main game UI. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the game interface to ensure it looks like a retro game.
Use Shadcn UI for forms like Login/Register, but heavily customize them with sharp borders, dark backgrounds, and pixel fonts.
Avoid box-shadow blur; use solid offset shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0_#000]) for the retro feel.
Ensure Websocket multiplayer displays other players moving in real-time.
